Hero.eyebrow: Hanoi University of Science and Technology
Hero.name: ITD Lab
Hero.bio: We build intelligent fault-diagnosis systems for industrial machinery, bridging signal processing, machine learning and embedded hardware to make predictive maintenance accessible and reliable.

About.title: About the Lab
About.body: ITD Lab specializes in digital signal processing for early fault detection in rotating machinery. We combine vibration analysis, classical signal processing and modern AI to build diagnostic systems that work in the lab and on the factory floor.

Research.title: Research Focus
Research.subtitle: Six interlocking directions, all aimed at reliable real-world diagnostics.
